examples: It would be perverse to stop this healthy trend.
Do you really mean that or are you just being deliberately perverse ?
Set against the compulsory mobility and clogged roads of "the great car economy", the Allegro age now has a certain perverse appeal.
Suppose for some perverse reason the central bank wanted to keep interest rates zero forever.
Taking away that ability, corporate treasurers say, might have the perverse effect of discouraging risk management.
